role_summary: a forensic audi tor investigates financial frauds, disputes, and irregularities using  accounting, auditing, and investigative techniques.
responsibilities: • investigate financial frauds and misconduct   • analyze complex financial data and transactions   • collect and document  audit evidence   • prepare forensic reports for legal proceedings   • support litigation and regulatory investigations   • coordinate with legal and enforcement agencies
qualifications: • ca qualification   • expertise in forensic accounting and investigation   • strong analytical and investigative skills   • knowledge of legal and regulatory processes       finance & accounts roles
